title: The Architecture Of Local-First Web Development
description: A practical, skeptical guide to building local-first web apps in 2026, offering honest perspectives on architecture patterns and trade-offs for experienced developers. Essential reading for anyone considering this paradigm shift in web development.

title: We built this. Now we own it.
description: A critical examination of the dark side of 'user-friendly' AI, exploring the real human consequences when products prioritize engagement over ethics. This thought-provoking piece challenges designers and product teams to consider their moral responsibility in building AI-driven experiences.

title: Vibe Coding Makes You a Bad Designer
description: An important wake-up call about the risks of relying on AI-generated code without intentional design thinking, especially as 75% of new code becomes AI-generated. This piece argues that abandoning systematic design principles for expedience undermines product quality and maintainability.

title: Collected consciousness
description: Explores how to design AI products that amplify human creativity rather than replace it, offering a framework for ethical and empowering product design in the AI era. A timely perspective on balancing automation with human agency.

title: The "passive income" trap ate a generation of entrepreneurs
description: A candid critique of how the passive income obsession has fragmented entrepreneurial focus and prevented builders from creating meaningful, differentiated products. Valuable perspective for product teams evaluating their strategy and sustainability.

title: The first taste of Joy
description: A reflective personal essay on discovering joy in design through everyday moments and beginner's mind, offering designers an antidote to burnout and over-optimization. This humanistic take reminds us that delightful UX often comes from simple, genuine experiences.

title: You are not immune to mode collapse
description: An insightful exploration of how digital products and AI systems can lose authenticity and utility through optimization, offering practical wisdom for maintaining genuine value in increasingly algorithmic experiences. Critical reading for anyone building AI-powered products.

title: Design.md supply
description: A practical resource that democratizes design system knowledge by aggregating curated design patterns, typography, and color libraries from top websites for AI agents and designers. A useful tool for speeding up design decisions while maintaining quality standards.
